title: Microfiber Ultra Absorbent Quick Dry Gym Towel Outdoor - Navy Blue XL
description:
The Ultra Compact Microfiber Towel by Outgo? is the best microfiber towel available. Never deal with over saturated towels again. The Ultra Absorbent Gym Towel holds five times its weight in water and dries faster than standard towels. Keep one in your gym bag, backpack, or travel kit and make your next workout or trip to the beach a whole lot more comfortable. Each Outgo towel is now integrated with SILVADUR? silver antimicrobial ions which prevent the growth of odor causing bacteria and fungi that accumulate on conventional towels. Outgo microfiber towels got your back. Available in eight colors.

Microfiber Ultra Absorbent Quick Dry Gym Towel Outdoor - Navy Blue XL

The Ultra Compact Microfiber Towel by Outgo? is the best microfiber towel available. Never deal with over saturated towels again. The Ultra Absorbent Gym Towel holds five times its weight in water and dries faster than standard towels. Keep one in your gym bag, backpack, or travel kit and make your next workout or trip to the beach a whole lot more comfortable.

Key Features

  • SUPER ABSORBENT - One Towel Absorbs up to 5 Times its Weight in Water
  • ULTRA COMPACT - Towel Rolls Up to Just 8" in Length | Great for Travel
  • EXTRA LARGE TOWEL - Unrolls to 35" x 62" | Easily Dry Off After Working Out, Swimming or Showering
  • GENTLY REMOVES DIRT - Super Soft Material Easily Removes Oil and Perspiration from Hands, Feet, and Body
  • TOILETRY BAG - Comes with Mesh Storage Bag | Hang to Dry

Product Specifications

  • MPN: NBTowelXL-460
  • UPC: 714094351213
  • Color: Navy
  • Size: 35 in x 62 in
